% 1 time (sec)
% 2 Mission state
% 3,4,5 (x,y,h) (m,m,rad)
% 6 Camera frame count
% 7-9 Line sensor: line position, e*kp, control y (rad/s), validCnt
%     Line sensor: Kp=0.2, tau_z=0.9s, tau_p=0.04s
% 10,11 trip A (distance and heading change)
% 12,13 trip B (distance and heading change)
